creator: elvstone@gmail.com
text:
I agree on this patch.

I'm very sorry that I'm such a lousy maintainer, but work and real
life has been a bitch lately. If someone feels like taking over
maintainership for irc/znc, be my guest. At the moment I can only be
thankful for the update patches that miwi and others provide.

Go ahead with the commit.

Elvis

2008/8/21 Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org>:
> Maintainer of irc/znc,
>
> Please note that PR ports/126717 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/126717
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
